prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
You’ve already won half the battle by showing up. That tiny act—sitting here, ready to begin—means you’re stronger than the fear or procrastination that held you back. This task? It’s not a mountain. It’s just one step, one breath, one minute of focus at a time. Break it down. Start small. You don’t have to be perfect—just present.  

You’ve handled harder things before, even if you don’t remember. Trust that part of you. Now, dive in. One thing. Right now.  

You’ve got this.  
And when you’re done? You’ll look back and say, “I did it.”  
So go. Begin.  
I believe in you. 💪🔥
